prompt: Create a transparent-background 2D battle VFX asset for Pokemon-style colorless attacks. Show only the effect element, with no character, arena, text, UI, watermark, or frame. Use a fading aftermath cluster with soft pearl motes, a few broken ring fragments, and subtle ivory/silver afterglow around a compact center. Keep the contrast lower than the impact bloom but still crisp enough to read cleanly in battle. Preserve a neutral battle-energy feel without leaning into fire, water, lightning, psychic, or darkness. Output a single isolated effect element on transparency.
negative_prompt: no background, no arena, no Pokemon body, no trainer, no text, no watermark, no UI, no frame, no checkerboard, no fake transparency pattern, no oversized smoke bank, no saturated elemental colors
notes: Low-alpha cleanup layer for the end of the hit.
